description: Style NoteSay hello to adidas' interpretation of colour block! These delectable pair of Geometrix shoes from the brand brings a sporty twist to casual footwear. Style this with slim Fit denims and a neutral shaded tee or a tonal monochrome one for maximum effect.Product DetailsRed textured upper on a round-toed casual shoeCentral blue lace-ups and a padded tonguePadded inner and soft footbedEVA midsoleTPU outsole with grooves all overMaterial and careSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
